case_title: PAUL KONG VS. JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, PAUL (J&M HEATING CO LTD) AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, JOHNNY ROBERT PJ CON INC)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, PAUL (J&M HEATING CO LTD)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF PAUL KONG RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONG, PAUL (J&M HEATING CO LTD)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED APR-23-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, JOHNNY ROBERT PJ CON INC)
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-16-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-03-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.00 FILED BY KONG, PAUL (J&M HEATING CO LTD) AS TO DEFENDANT NEVAREZ, JOHNNY ROBERT PJ CON INC) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KONG, PAUL (J&M HEATING CO LTD) NEVAREZ, JOHNNY ROBERT PJ CON INC)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PAUL KONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY ROBERT NEVAREZ IS PRESENT. AFTER TESTIMONY IT WAS DETERMINED BY JPT DAVID LAVINE THAT INCORRECT DEFENDANT WAS SUED IN THIS MATTER AND WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DURING PROCEEDING FOR IMPROPER DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
